prose: Furan frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap computed using DFT with B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied furan.xyz (9 atoms). SCF converged in 9 cycles with no warnings. HOMO energy = −6.3597638 eV, LUMO energy = −0.1024036 eV, yielding a Koopmans-style orbital gap of 6.2573602 eV. Derived Koopmans properties also reported: vertical IP = 6.3598 eV, vertical EA = 0.1024 eV, electronegativity = 3.2311 eV, chemical hardness = 3.1287 eV, electrophilicity index = 1.6684 eV. Total electronic energy = −230.11429 Hartree. Integrity status: ok, trustworthy.
